55082.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
55082.description: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

55083.title: Anderson Cooper 360
55083.description: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

55084.title: Don Lemon Tonight
55084.description: Don Lemon presents the biggest stories, newsmakers, and spirited conversations of the day.

55085.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
55085.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

55086.title: World Sport
55086.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

55087.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
55087.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

55088.title: World Sport
55088.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

55089.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
55089.description: Live from Atlanta, Rosemary Church brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

55090.title: Early Start
55090.description: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

55091.title: New Day
55091.description: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

55092.title: World Sport
55092.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

55093.title: First Move with Julia Chatterley
55093.description: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

55094.title: Connect the World
55094.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

55095.title: World Sport
55095.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

55096.title: Connect the World
55096.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

55098.title: Inside Africa
55098.description: From superbikes to racecars and beyond, highlighting some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels and providing an inside look at what life is like on and off the race track.

55099.title: Amanpour
55099.description: Peabody Award-winning journalist Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international correspondent, hosts this half-hour weeknight interview program, with each episode focusing on a newsworthy topic and featuring guests, from global leaders to heads of state and cultural icons, who are comfortable challenging conventional wisdom.

55100.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
55100.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

55101.title: Quest Means Business
55101.description: Richard Quest and a team of correspondents analyze the facts and figures from the business world to help people earn money and spend it wisely.

55102.title: Africa Avant Garde
55102.description: We hear from some of the continent's most experimental contemporary artists, including acclaimed Nigerian visual artist Victor Ehikhamenor.

55103.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
55103.description: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.

55104.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
55104.description: Anchor Wolf Blitzer invites CNN correspondents, analysts and guests for timely coverage of the day's news events. Patterned after the concept of the White House Situation Room, the Monday-Saturday show is a discussion forum often with opposing sides debating current national affairs.
